---
title: "Title"
author: "Janis Sonnemann"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output:
  html_document:
    toc: yes
    toc_float: true
    code_folding: hide
  pdf_document:
    toc: yes
    toc_depth: 3
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: console
knit: (function(input, ...) {JanisHelpers::knit_multiple_dated(input, path = "XXX")})
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
# Before start:
## in knit: output_dir replace XXX with short name for subdirectory
## in opts_chunk below replace XXX with same name
knitr::opts_chunk$set(fig.path = paste0("output/XXX/figs/", Sys.Date(),"-"), dev = "png", 
                      warning = FALSE,
                      # hides code in pdf file
                      echo = knitr::is_html_output())


# update JanisHelpers
# install.packages("~/R/eigene R Pakete/JanisHelpers", repos = NULL, type = "source")
# install.packages("librarian")

librarian::shelf(tidyverse)



```
